_comment: FR-PIVOT setup-tag taxonomy. Edit the display names below (the CODES on the
left are stable join keys; the names on the right are yours to rename).
setup_tags  : code -> human display name, shown in the pivot's by-setup view.
~8 slots reserved; rename / add / remove freely.
order_ref_aliases : maps a Flex orderReference string (stamped by Backtrader on
quant orders) -> a setup_tag CODE. This is the TIER-2 auto-tag:
an entry whose order_ref matches here is tagged without manual work.
Manual-order round-trips (no order_ref / no match) fall back to the
Priority: annotations.csv explicit > order_ref alias > untagged (FR-PIVOT-3c).
